description:
This Genie Space lets you explore trading activity data on Asset/Users level:

**WHEN ASKING ABOUT ASSETS, USE ACCURATE ASSET NAME!**

*Segmentation
- Asset/Asset Type
- Customer data

*Key Dates: 
- Open Trade Date
- Close Trade Date 
- First Dates (Registration date, FTD date)

*Metrics (Manual/Mirror,Real/CFD)
- Total trades / Open Trades / Close Trades
- Invested Amount open / Closed
title: eToro Trades
